questions.text: What does Allah swear by in the first two verses?
questions.answer: The Day of Resurrection and the 'self-reproaching soul' (an-Nafs al-Lawwamah).

questions.text: What part of the human body does Allah say He is able to perfectly reconstruct?
questions.answer: The fingertips (proportion of the fingers).

questions.text: What is the 'disbeliever's desire' mentioned in Verse 5?
questions.answer: To continue sinning ahead of him (denying what is to come).

questions.text: What will happen to the moon and the sun on that Day?
questions.answer: The moon will be eclipsed, and the sun and moon will be joined together.

questions.text: Where will man try to flee on the Day of Judgment?
questions.answer: He will ask: 'Where is the escape?' but there is no refuge.

questions.text: Who will be a witness against the human being on that Day?
questions.answer: The human himself; his own self will be a witness against him even if he presents excuses.

questions.text: What was the Prophet (SAW) commanded NOT to do during the revelation of the Quran?
questions.answer: Not to move his tongue quickly to hasten its recitation/memorization.

questions.text: Who is responsible for the collection and recitation of the Quran?
questions.answer: Allah (Verse 17).

questions.text: Why do the disbelievers reject the Hereafter according to Verse 20?
questions.answer: Because they love the immediate (world) and leave the Hereafter.

questions.text: How will the faces of the believers look on that Day?
questions.answer: Radiant (Nadirah), looking toward their Lord.

questions.text: How will the faces of the disbelievers look on that Day?
questions.answer: Contorted/gloomy (Basirah), expecting a back-breaking calamity.

questions.text: What is the state of the soul when it reaches the collarbones (death)?
questions.answer: It will be asked: 'Who is a healer?' and the dying person will realize it is the parting.

questions.text: How are the legs described at the moment of death?
questions.answer: The leg will be wound about the [other] leg.

questions.text: What three things did the disbeliever NOT do (Verse 31-32)?
questions.answer: He did not believe, he did not pray, and he denied the truth and turned away.

questions.text: What is the repeated warning in Verse 34-35?
questions.answer: 'Woe to you, and woe! Then woe to you, and woe!'.

questions.text: Does man think he will be left 'neglected' or 'without purpose'?
questions.answer: No (Verse 36).

questions.text: What are the stages of creation mentioned at the end of the Surah?
questions.answer: A sperm-drop, then a clinging clot, then Allah fashioned and proportioned him.

questions.text: What did Allah make from the human creation?
questions.answer: The two mates, the male and the female.

questions.text: What is the final rhetorical question of the Surah?
questions.answer: 'Is not That One able to give life to the dead?'.

questions.text: What is 'An-Nafs al-Lawwamah'?
questions.answer: The self-reproaching soul that blames itself for its shortcomings, which is a sign of faith.
